titleStmt.title: SII 8.374: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 374. (A.R. No. 90-C of 1903). ON A ROCK NEAR THE POND BESIDE THE FIRST GATEWAY FROM THE TOP OF THE HILL.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyaprava¨rddhamā nācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ kalyāṇada nelebīḍinalu
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷu sāvāsi vijaiṁbhibhaṭṭanāyakanuṁ
bimma bhaṭṭanāyakanuṁ jēṣṭabhaṭṭanāyakanuṁ śrīmadguttiyakōṭeya rājādhyakṣada pāḷeyadintiralū ranumatyadiṁ
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīramahēśvaraṁ cōḷakaṭakakarituragapaṭusubhaṭanicaya ni¨rjjita
baḷavadaribaḷatimirakhaṁḍanapratāpamā¨rttaṁḍaṁ nikarakoḷgaṁḍaṁ draviḷamaṁḍalikaśiraḥkhaṁḍanaṁ maṁḍaḷikamukhamaṁḍanaṁ nadaṭama
ṇḍaḷikatārakāsurāri dasava¨rnnamurāri mitramaṁḍaḷikakuḷā¨rnnavacaṁdraṁ bhōgāmarēṁdra satyavikhyātaṁ maṁḍaḷikamāndhātraṁ nāhanīṟaṁ sēneyeṁkakāṟaṁ
pallikōṭegharaṭṭa ghū¨rjaradiśāpaṭṭaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvarakaṭṭida lagumalavaranallaguṇaṁ nāmādi samasta praśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ
mallarasaru tuṁbuḷa nelevīḍinallu siṁdavāḍi 1000 ra munāḷuttaṁ sukhadimire tatpādapadmōpa jīvigaḷu samasta praśastisahitaṁ
śrīmadguttiya kōṭeya daṁḍanāyakaṁ kēśavarājanuṁ siṁgarasanuṁ basaṁtarasanuṁmudda rasanuṁ śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakāla[¨r]da
ṟeneye sa¨rvvadhārisaṁvatsarada Āścamuja ba 9 yādivāradaṁdu Arisinageya viṣṇubhaṭṭa riṁge viṣṇudēva¨rgge snānanivēdya
ṣṭā¨rccana pūje punaskārakkaṁ dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi kōṭeya nairityadiśāvaradalu biṭṭa kari
yakeyi mattaru 12 Iṁtīdha¨rmmamaṁ tṛbhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhiyāgi biṭṭaru ©
mattaṁ kōṭeya paścimadiśāvarada kaḷḷavāṇiśeya bāgiliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu biṭṭa kariya
keyi mattaru 100 gāṇa 1 tōṭa 1 © kalkuṭigemāḍage biṭṭa mattaru 12 tamma gāṟa
bōgōjaṁge mattaru 8 © dēvara keyyisīme baḍegaṇe baṟemūḍalu
haḷḷave mēre Āgnēyadalu nairityadalu beṭṭa
haḍuvalu keṟeya mēṟe vāyavyadalu
kaḷḷavyaṇesegeya
ḷḷigaḷa
bahu bhi¨rvvasudhā dattā rājanyaisagarā
tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁThe rest of the inscription is damaged. There are two more inscriptions of the Western dynasty on the same rock; but they are covered by the basement at the entrance.
Digital edition of SII 8.374 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
